nodes.name: Herero chat
nodes.summary: Herero chat（Herero chat，学名 Namibornis herero），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于诺克卢福山脉，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 诺克卢福山脉
nodes.summary: 诺克卢福山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Herero chat，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Herero chat is found in southwestern Africa where its range corresponds to the Namibian savanna woodlands, from the far southwest of Angola through western Namibia as far south as the Naukluft Mountains. This is a locally common species found on inselbergs and escarpments with scattered Acacia, Maerua shrubs, Commiphora and Terminalia trees, particularly where the vegetation follows drainage lines

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Herero chat is found in southwestern Africa where its range corresponds to the Namibian savanna woodlands, from the far southwest of Angola through western Namibia as far south as the Naukluft Mountains.
